# Frist Prompt for Project Setup

Date: 08-Jun-2026

---

NOTE to AI assistant:

* This document is generated by human.
* It contains instruction for you to read only.
* Do NOT edit this file.

---

## Background

I am an AI Engineer. I am new to this industry (software and AI), with about 1 year experience only.

I have PhD in applied physics and 10 years experience working on material analysis and failure analysis in semiconductor manufacturing industry. I consider myself a fast learner and strong in analysis.

For computer skill, I have some basic understanding of C language, data structure and algorithm from courses in my university study. I have experience in Python coding in my recent jobs. I can handle about half of the leetcode mid level questions.

After my career in semiconductor, I received some training in data analysis. I can use Python to do EDA. I also have basic SQL knowledge enough for data analyst. I have also received training in machine learning and AI. I understand traditional models before LLM age. I also have basic understanding of LLM artechitectual and agentic framework.

Now I am an AI Engineer. I build web apps and data pipelines. I vibe code a lot using AI agents like Cursor and Claude. So far I can manage my work, but I feel lacking knowledges in computer science and software engineering is dragging my legs. For example, to develpe softwares deployed on cloud, I need to consider CI/CD, scalability, choose artechitectual / libraries for efficiency and cost. I also need to understand how to improve security.

I want to upskill myself on these scopes.

To help you to understand more about my current skills, you can refer to my recent projects:
1. `/home/zhangzhou/Desktop/Projects/aquarium-main`
    * My contribution in this repo is the chatbot and the contribution pipeline.
2. `/home/zhangzhou/Desktop/Projects/arena-concept-experiment`
    * This repo is mostly built by myself using vibe coding.
    * By the way I have no experience in javascript and frontend coding.

You may raise questions to better understand me.

## Objective

You should generating education material customized for me to upskill in:
* Computer science
* Software engineering
* Up to date AI technologies

After the training, I should be able to:
* Work as full stack software developer and architecturer
* Understand all kinds of models (LLM, image model, etc.) and apply them to agentic frameworks in app dev
* Keep updated on latest technologies and tool stacks

NOTE:
* Most likely I will keep vibe coding. So for coding skills what I need is able to understand codes with the help of AI assistant.

## Approaches

I want to upskill myself in below 2 approaches:
1. Systematic modular courses
2. Daily upskill reading material

I will try to allocate 2 to 3 hours daily for my upskilling. I want to use these 2 appraches in parallel.

### 1. Systematic modular courses

Before starting, you should analyze my requirements and make a plan on the modules I need and the sequence suitable for my learning.
* Your plan should include module name, chapter name and section name.
* Learning sequence can be one module after another, or some modules can be studied in parallel. You can judge based on which one suits me best.

You should write the plan in `courses/plan.md`
* I will review the plan and maybe make revisions before we implement it.
* You can also use the same file to track my learning progress.

After finalize the plan, we can start the daily learning phase. It should work like this:
1. I start a conversation with you and instruct something like: "Prepare today's course material for me."
    * You should remember my skills and learning status and keep them updated.
    * You should only generate daily course material upon my request and customize it according to my skills and knowledges.
2. You generates course material and save it as `*.md` doc.
    * Path convension: `courses/{01}-{module short name}/{01}-{chapter short name}/{01}-{section short name}.md`, I like to put numbers before names so that they appear in correct orders in tree view.
    * You may put links to web articles or videos for my reference if necessary.
3. I will study your course material and Q&A with you. Based on my judgement, I may also ask you to provide some exercises or tests.
4. After I feel comfortable with this learning session, I will instruct you to finalize the course material. You should update it based on the context of our Q&A to make it more customized for my future use or review. Then update plan status and your memory on my skill and knowledge.

### 2. Daily upskill reading material

It works like this:
1. I start a conversation with you and instruct something like: "Prepare today's reading material for me."
2. You search online and find 1 to 2 article, paper or YouTube video for me to study.
    * Save a markdown file with path convension: `upskill-readings/{yyyy}/{mm}/{dd}-{short topic name}.md`
    * This file should contain link + short summary to each reading material.
    * Select topics that matches my skill and knowledge. Choose those I can understand but expand my knowledge at the same time.
    * The topics can be related to my courses in progress, or update to date AI model / framework info, latest popular tool stacks, interesting new products I can refer and learn, etc. You should diversify the topics selected to help me reach my goal.
3. I will study the meterial and Q&A with you.
4. Finally I will instruct you to finalize the material. You should update it based on the context of our Q&A to make it more customized for my future use or review. Then update your memory on my skill and knowledge.

## AI agent rule

I may use multiple AI agents on this project, so you must follow the rule defined in `agent-docs/README.md` to cooperate with other agents.
